skill.name: development
skill.description: Comprehensive web, mobile, and backend development workflow bundling frontend, backend, full-stack, and mobile development skills for end-to-end application delivery.
skill.summary: Complete development workflow that guides you through all phases from project setup to deployment using specialized AI skills.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill is a documentation file (SKILL.md) that describes a development workflow bundle. The static analyzer flagged 84 external_commands patterns and 16 cryptographic warnings, but all are false positives. The backtick patterns are markdown code block delimiters, not shell execution. No executable code exists in this file - it only contains documentation and references to other skills.

content.value_statement: Building applications requires juggling multiple skills across frontend, backend, and deployment. This workflow bundle orchestrates specialized AI skills through every development phase from scaffolding to production deployment.
actual_capabilities: Guide through 7 development phases from setup to deployment
Coordinate specialized skills for frontend, backend, and database development
Provide technology-specific workflows for React, Python, Node.js, and mobile
Integrate testing, code review, and quality gates into development process
Support CI/CD pipeline setup and containerization
Enable cross-platform application development with unified workflow
limitations: This is a workflow bundle - it references other skills rather than providing direct functionality
Requires additional skills to be available for full workflow execution
Does not execute code directly - serves as documentation and guidance only
Best suited for developers familiar with modern web and mobile development stacks

use_cases.title: Full-Stack Application Development
use_cases.description: Build complete web applications from initial scaffolding through production deployment using coordinated AI skills for each development phase.

use_cases.title: Technology Stack Migration
use_cases.description: Modernize legacy applications by following structured workflow phases for refactoring, testing, and deploying to new technology stacks.

use_cases.title: Cross-Platform Mobile Development
use_cases.description: Develop mobile applications for iOS and Android using React Native or Flutter with guided workflow through architecture, development, and testing phases.

prompt_templates.title: Getting Started with Project Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to start a new project using the development workflow. Help me identify the right project type and technology stack, then guide me through Phase 1 setup steps.
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new web application project

prompt_templates.title: Frontend Component Development
prompt_templates.prompt: I'm in Phase 2 of the development workflow. Use the workflow to help me design and implement a dashboard component using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with proper state management.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building UI components with modern frontend stack

prompt_templates.title: Full API Development Cycle
prompt_templates.prompt: Guide me through Phase 3 (Backend) and Phase 4 (Database) of the development workflow. I need to create REST API endpoints with JWT authentication and set up Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL for my e-commerce application.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building backend services with database integration

prompt_templates.title: Production Deployment Pipeline
prompt_templates.prompt: I have completed development and testing phases. Use the development workflow to guide me through Phase 6 (Code Quality) and Phase 7 (Build and Deployment) to containerize my app and set up CI/CD for automated deployment.

output_examples.input: I need to set up a new Next.js project with full-stack capabilities
output: Following the development workflow, let's start with Phase 1: Project Setup
1. Project Type: Next.js 14 full-stack application with App Router
3. Use the prompt: 'Use @app-builder to scaffold a new React + Node.js full-stack application'
4. After scaffolding, proceed to Phase 2 for frontend development with frontend-developer and tailwind-patterns skills

output_examples.input: How do I implement authentication in my backend?
output: This falls under Phase 3: Backend Development in the workflow
Recommended approach using the development workflow:
- Use @backend-architect to design secure API endpoints
- Use @api-design-principles to follow REST best practices
After implementation, run Phase 6 code review with @security-scanning-security-sast before deployment

best_practices: Complete quality gates before advancing to the next phase - ensure all tests pass and code review is complete
Use technology-specific workflow subsections when working within a particular stack for more focused guidance
Run security scans and linting in Phase 6 before any deployment to catch issues early
anti_patterns: Skipping testing phase - always complete Phase 5 before code review to catch bugs early
Deploying without completing quality gates - ensure all checkboxes are verified before production release
Mixing workflow phases - follow the sequential order for best results unless you have specific reasons to deviate

faq.question: Do I need to install all referenced skills to use this workflow?
faq.answer: This workflow serves as documentation and guidance. You only need the specific skills relevant to your current development phase. The workflow helps you identify which skills to invoke at each step.

faq.question: Can I use this workflow for a specific technology like React only?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow includes technology-specific subsections for React/Next.js, Python/FastAPI, Node.js/Express, and mobile development. You can follow only the sections relevant to your stack.

faq.question: Is this workflow suitable for beginners?
faq.answer: The workflow assumes familiarity with modern development concepts. Beginners may benefit from using individual skills first, then adopting the full workflow as they gain experience with the development process.

faq.question: How do I adapt this workflow for an existing project?
faq.answer: Start from the phase that matches your current need. For example, join at Phase 5 for adding tests to existing code, or Phase 6 for code review and quality improvements before deployment.

faq.question: Does this workflow support microservices architecture?
faq.answer: Yes. Phase 3 (Backend) includes guidance for microservices architecture design through the @backend-architect skill. The workflow scales to both monolithic and distributed architectures.

faq.question: Can I use this workflow with Claude Code or other AI coding tools?
faq.answer: Yes. This workflow is designed to work with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. The prompt templates are compatible with all supported AI tools and can be adapted to your preferred interface.
